properties.name: Garden Grove Tourism Improvement District
properties.area: Harbor Boulevard hotel corridor, including Tier I north of Lampson Avenue and Tier II south of Lampson Avenue
properties.boundaryMethod: Generalized from the City of Garden Grove FY 2026-27 annual report and Ordinance No. 2782 boundary description; the precise adopted map is on file with the City Clerk but is not published as GIS
